summary: BUG-192-001: Removed onPointerDown handlers with event.preventDefault() + stopPropagation() from AnomalyCard.tsx Acknowledge/Resolve buttons. These prevented React's pointer capture from releasing properly, causing sidebar navigation to stop responding after interacting with Anomaly cards. Fixed by keeping only onClick with stopPropagation(). BUG-192-002: Fixed invisible progress bars in light mode across 5 files. All progress bar track containers used bg-white/[0.08], bg-white/10, or bg-white/[0.06] which are transparent on white backgrounds. Replaced with bg-muted (uses CSS variable that adapts to light/dark themes). Affected: ClusterHealthWidget, NodeResourceBreakdown (2x), PodStatusWidget, ui/progress, app/page.tsx ResourceBar. BUG-192-003: Redesigned PresenceBar.tsx user avatars. Moved user avatar list to the right side of the bar (flex justify-between layout), increased size from 28px to 32px (h-8 w-8), added accent color background to make them clearly look like user avatars, added CSS tooltip on hover showing user name + current page, added hover state with border/background color change, added proper ARIA labels.
